summary: Dependent sync must preserve typed parent scope and generic rows, while fresh-store migration must initialize WAL inside the bounded SQLite lock retry path.
reason: This printed tree predates parent-context injection and typed savepoint isolation, and it initialized WAL as a connection-opening pragma outside migration retry control. Nested responses could violate typed scope columns or discard generic rows, while concurrent fresh opens could fail with SQLITE_BUSY before migration acquired its pinned connection.
validated_outcome: Parent-scope regressions pass, 50 synchronized concurrent fresh migrations pass, and go test ./... plus go test -race ./... both pass.
